task: Add text gate for edu tier3 free-tier candidate quality

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires real evidence and residual risk reporting when production quality checks remain.
Code changes require completion evidence, real runtime verification, and deployment source-of-truth discipline.

problem: Free-tier samples after key registration showed 0 refined and 25 skipped candidates because the backlog runner selected general education/news/blog items without an explicit AI or digital education signal.
fix: Both edu tier3 runners now default to a high-precision curated source allowlist, an AI/digital education text gate, a K-12/parent/student audience gate over title plus summary, and a small deny gate for institution PR/noisy education items. Low-precision sources found during launchd verification were pruned from the allowlist. --no-text-gate remains available for emergency full-backlog processing.

verification.name: local syntax check
verification.result: pass

verification.name: candidate gate unit tests
verification.result: pass: 2 passed

verification.name: macmini text gate preview
verification.command: query pending edu_consulting candidates with AI/digital education ILIKE gate
verification.result: preview showed 2640 gated pending candidates; top candidates shifted from general education/blog items to AI education, AI career, and EdWeek AI policy items

verification.name: macmini text gate sample before deny gate
verification.result: pass: SQL gate executed in production and runner completed 정제 3 / 스킵 7 / 실패 0; all 10 sampled ids were saved, but institution PR false positives remained

verification.name: candidate gate unit tests after deny gate
verification.result: pass: 2 passed

verification.name: macmini free launchd first run before audience gate
verification.result: residual risk found: first RunAtLoad completed 정제 16 / 스킵 24 / 실패 0, so launchd was booted out before the next hourly run and audience gate was added

verification.name: macmini audience gate preview
verification.command: query pending edu_consulting candidates with AI/digital gate, K-12/parent/student audience gate, and deny gate
verification.result: preview showed 400 gated pending candidates with top items focused on 자녀교육, 중학생, 학부모, AI classrooms, and student career guidance

verification.name: macmini audience gate sample
verification.result: residual risk: completed 정제 3 / 스킵 7 / 실패 0. The gate is safe but still too noisy for unattended launchd.

verification.name: macmini curated source allowlist preview
verification.command: query pending edu_consulting candidates with source allowlist plus text/audience/deny gates
verification.result: preview showed 42 pending candidates, led by EdWeek, Brunch AI education for parents, GoogleNews digital dependence, and parent/child smartphone items

verification.name: candidate gate unit tests after source allowlist
verification.result: pass: 2 passed

verification.name: macmini curated source allowlist sample
verification.result: pass: completed 정제 10 / 스킵 0 / 실패 0

verification.name: macmini launchd RunAtLoad after first source allowlist
verification.result: residual risk found: completed 정제 13 / 스킵 19 / 실패 0. launchd was booted out again because skip rate was 59.4 percent.

verification.name: macmini source quality diagnosis
verification.command: source/model-tag aggregate over refined_outputs from the launchd verification window
verification.result: GoogleNews_디지털의존 produced 4 refined and 11 skipped, The74Million produced 2 refined and 4 skipped, and Chalkbeat produced 0 refined and 2 skipped. These sources were removed from the allowlist.

verification.name: macmini pruned source allowlist deploy
verification.result: pass: deployment source-of-truth check and Mac Mini target diff check both passed

verification.name: macmini pruned source allowlist runtime check
verification.result: pass: free-tier key path loaded and runner returned 정제 대상 없음 after the noisy backlog was exhausted

verification.name: free-tier launchd safety limit
verification.result: pass: launchd batch size reduced from 40 to 10 and cost check interval reduced from 20 to 10 before re-enabling Gemini free-tier automation

verification.name: macmini free-tier launchd re-enabled
verification.command: install updated com.harness.edu-tier3-free.plist, launchctl bootstrap, then inspect launchctl print and logs
verification.result: pass: LaunchAgent loaded with --free-tier --limit 10 --cost-every 10. RunAtLoad used GEMINI_API_KEY_FREE, returned 정제 대상 없음, and exited 0.

verification.name: manual full-backlog sample
verification.result: pass with quality warning: completed 정제 2 / 스킵 8 / 실패 0, pending decreased from 6283 to 6273, confirming full backlog is mostly triage/cleanup work rather than high-quality refinement work

verification.name: rule triage implementation tests
verification.result: pass: 4 pytest cases passed; LaunchAgent plist is valid. The job now rule-skips up to 50 obvious noise candidates before Gemini-refining up to 10 high-precision candidates.

verification.name: macmini rule triage sample
verification.result: pass: saved 5 edu-triage:rule-skip rows and returned 정제 대상 없음 for the high-precision Gemini gate

verification.name: macmini rule triage launchd enablement
verification.command: install updated com.harness.edu-tier3-free.plist, launchctl bootstrap, then inspect logs and pending counts
verification.result: pass: LaunchAgent loaded with --free-tier --limit 10 --triage-limit 50 --cost-every 10. RunAtLoad saved 50 edu-triage:rule-skip rows, found no high-precision Gemini candidates, exited 0, and pending decreased to 6218.

verification.name: rule triage throughput increase
verification.result: pass: after successful 50-row RunAtLoad verification, rule triage limit increased to 200 per hour while Gemini refinement remains capped at 10 per hour

verification.name: macmini 200-row rule triage run
verification.command: reload com.harness.edu-tier3-free with --triage-limit 200, inspect logs and pending count
verification.result: pass: RunAtLoad saved 200 additional edu-triage:rule-skip rows, found no high-precision Gemini candidates, exited 0, and pending decreased from 6218 to 6018

remaining_verification: Gemini free-tier is the selected Tier3 path. Launchd should run rule triage first with --triage-limit 200, then Gemini-refine high-precision candidates with --limit 10. Continue monitoring logs; if rule-skip deletes valuable items or Gemini skip rate exceeds 50 percent, boot out the job and tighten the rules.
